videos.title: Where Should You Spend Your Money?
videos.description:
Everyone has to start somewhere and one question that always gets asked is "What supplements should I buy?". We wanted to discuss are supplements something you need to prioritize or are there other areas that should be prioritized when spending money on your fitness journey?

videos.title: How Strong Should You Be?
videos.description:
How strong should you be after one year of strength training?

If you've been lifting for 12 months (or you're about to start) this episode of The Iron Palace Podcast breaks down realistic strength standards for beginners. We’re talking squat, bench press, deadlift, overhead press, and what numbers actually make sense after your first year in the gym.

Forget Instagram highlight reels. Forget elite-level comparisons. This is real-world strength progress.

If you're searching for:
“how strong should I be after 1 year”
“beginner strength standards”
“how much should I squat after 1 year”
“realistic bench press after 1 year”
“deadlift goals first year”

This is the video for you.

💪 Stop comparing yourself to elite lifters.
💪 Start setting realistic, aggressive goals.
💪 Build real strength.
Music:
Necktie Social - https://open.spotify.com/album/7wAaKRUEftEGVMYMNcPT3P?si=1w6ZHri8SH2B1AKjXHZfyQ

videos.title: Derek Wilcox: From Bending Bars to Bending Arms!
videos.description:
This week we sit down with the one and only Derek Wilcox! we talk the new rule changes to powerlifting and his career in equipped lifting. After hitting a 1000 lb. squat Derek now turns his eyes toward jujitsu and Highland Games. Come listen and learn from a legend on how it's done!
Derek's Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/wilcoxstrengthinc/?hl=en
